cells.rationale: Reaping a live-held lock would break repo-wide staging mutual exclusion including daemon fan-in merge holders, a subtle concurrency-correctness invariant that clears the opus gate, at xhigh for the flock-vs-exclusive lock semantics a wrong abstraction propagates from.
